title: stegnogramma australis
intro: Stegnogramma australis, also known as the Austral fern, is a species of fern native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Stegnogramma australis include its ability to treat various conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of Stegnogramma australis can be found in teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in traditional Australian herbal medicine.
